name: Island Vintage Coffee
tagline: 100% Kona coffee, acai bowls the size of your head, and the best iced latte in Waikiki — tourist-friendly but genuinely good.
mustOrder: Mauna Kea Iced Coffee — Kona coffee, coconut gelato, black lava sea salt
Acai Bowl — massive, loaded with granola and fresh fruit
parking: Royal Hawaiian Center validated parking or street meters on Kalakaua Ave
talkStory: Founded in 2008 by a local family determined to serve only 100% Hawaiian-grown beans — never the cheap 10% Kona blends sold in tourist shops. The signature Mauna Kea Iced Coffee with coconut gelato and black lava sea salt is iconic and has been copied across the island. Their acai bowls are massive and consistently ranked among Oahu’s best. Multiple locations now, but the Royal Hawaiian Center original has the most energy. The line moves fast even when it looks long — they run a tight operation.
